title: rubus selleanus
intro: Rubus selleanus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is native to the Himalayan region and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus selleanus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
